Who I Am

Chennai-based Content Professional

I'm a dynamic content professional with 5+ years of experience spanning content writing, digital marketing, and IT support. I've authored 500+ SEO-optimised blogs for healthcare brands — with multiple articles earning Page 1 Google rankings and one featured in Google AI Overview.

My approach blends deep research, strategic keyword planning, and clear storytelling to create content that not only reads well but ranks consistently. Backed by a Computer Science background and CCNA certification, I understand both the creative and technical sides of digital content.

Chennai, Tamil Nadu Healthcare Content B.E. Computer Science CCNA Certified 5+ Years Experience
